name: Joseph
oracleText:
Vigilance
Other creatures you control have ward {1}.
Whenever another creature enters the battlefield under your control, untap it.
flavorText: "Fear not to take unto thee Mary thy wife." — Matthew 1:20
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "Saint Joseph" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Guardian of the Child

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.sourceNotes: A dedicated Saint Joseph portrait gives the guardian card a clear old-master devotional treatment.
